next_steps: Perform kidney biopsy for histopathological diagnosis
Obtain autoimmune serology: ANA, anti-dsDNA, C3/C4, and anti-PLA2R antibodies
Check serum protein electrophoresis and immunofixation for monoclonal gammopathy
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric therapy
Consider prophylactic anticoagulation due to severe hypoalbuminemia and hypercoagulable state
Evaluate thyroid status with repeat TSH and free T4 to assess if subclinical hypothyroidism is contributing to fluid retention
